user.title: Moen Smart Water Network
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Moen Smart Water Network account.

credentials.title: Moen account
credentials.description: Enter your Moen Smart Water Network account email and password. If you sign in with Apple or Google, use the token option instead.

token.title: OAuth tokens
token.description: Paste the access and refresh tokens captured from the Moen app.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Moen API

abort.already_configured: This Moen account is already configured

start_watering.name: Start watering
start_watering.description: Start manual watering for a specific zone on a Moen irrigation controller.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device identifier (duid) for the Moen irrigation controller.

zone_id.name: Zone ID
zone_id.description: The zone identifier to start watering.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Duration to run watering in minutes.
